instruction: There are currently 25 frogs in a (large) pond. The frog population grows exponentially, tripling every 10 days. How long will it take (in days) for there to be 220 frogs in the pond? Time to 220 frogs: [ANS] days The pond's ecosystem can support 1600 frogs. How long until the situation becomes critical? Time to 1600 frogs: [ANS] days
